notes: 2026-07-05 nightly: FIRST CM SLING SHOT TRADE CLOSED - BNB SHORT -20.0% SL after 28.1h (15:10 UTC Jul 4). Profile: score 6/8 (honest 7 post daily-macro fix), 4h TF, aggressive pullback entry, ADX 33, entered mid-bar pre-closed-candle-fix, never went favorable (max adverse -17.6%), shorted into broad SSL+1 rally. SECOND CM trade fired 54min after slot freed: APT SHORT 16:04 UTC Jul 4, score 6/8, 4h TF, 4min after 4h bar close (closed-candle fix timing working - fresh-bar entry, not late-window). Fill $0.6381, SL clamped 2% to $0.65086, TP $0.61258 (2.0 RR). Trail->breakeven at 00:11 Jul 5 (1R reached); max adverse only -2.54%. at_risk gate cycling correctly. ATOM day 12: bounced to $1.6043, within 0.4% of trail SL $1.6104, survived - still locked +76.7%. LEVERAGE FINDING (not a bug): signal computed 12.5x for APT but HL coin max is 3x; live.py deliberately records HL actual leverage. Sizing is risk-based (risk_usd/sl_pct) so account risk correct (~0.9%) regardless. Side effects: (a) executor SL clamp uses PLANNED leverage (2% clamp at 12.5x vs 8.3% allowed at 3x) - conservative, tightened APT structure SL 2.19%->2.0%; (b) channel lev_pct not comparable across coins (BNB -20% ROE at 10x vs APT small % at 3x). Flagged for future normalization, no code change tonight. NO parameter changes: CM system n=1 closed trade. MIN_SCORE=6, TP_RATIO=2.0, MIN_ADX gate25/bonus30, TRAIL_PCT=8%, MAX_TRADES=1 at-risk counting, SESSION 11-24, WATCHLIST 14 - all verified by grep at session start; v1.9.2 (23:05 Jul 4) audited = ai_brain committing Jul 4 indicator fixes, no changes of its own. Note: 23:00 Jul 4 candle scan ran at 23:05 (review.py/ai_brain block main loop ~5min) - last in-session scan runs late; structural, benign, watch. 504 cluster 07:07 Jul 4 transient, handled. BNB now 2T/0%WR/-15%avg - below 5-trade removal threshold, keep. Ex-post note: 5% trail would have banked +102% on ATOM's Jul 4 bounce vs +76.7% locked at 8% - but 8% validated across 34 old trades; revisit only at CM n>=10.
